title: xantolis burmanica var. lenticellata
intro: Xantolis burmanica var. lenticellata, commonly known as the Burmese Xantolis, is a variety of the Xantolis burmanica plant species that belongs to the family Sapotaceae. The medicinal properties of Xantolis burmanica var. lenticellata lie in its bark, leaves, and roots, which are traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The health benefits of this plant include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been found to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and protect against cell damage. Xantolis burmanica var. lenticellata can be prepared in various herbal forms, including decoctions, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to alleviate symptoms and promote overall well-being.
